data.body: Fix implemented in scripts/create-dso-app.sh: after resolved_plugin_root computation (Step 5b), invokes project-detect.sh, captures stdout to a tmpfile, and exports DSO_DETECT_OUTPUT before dso-setup.sh is called. Cleanup after dso-setup completes. RED test at tests/scripts/test-create-dso-app-populates-detect-output.sh: 3 assertions green (dso-setup invoked, DSO_DETECT_OUTPUT exported, points to non-empty detect file). test-dso-setup.sh full suite: 79/79 green, no regression. Awaiting Bug #2-4 completion before commit.
